title: Tuberculosis (TB) - NHS
text:
for some people who are at higher risk of catching TB or getting seriously ill from it, including:
babies who live in areas of the UK where TB is more common babies and children who live with someone who has TB babies and children who were born or lived in a country where TB is more common babies and children whose parents or grandparents were born in a country where TB is more common people aged 35 and under who are spending more than 3 months in a country where TB is more common people at risk of getting TB through their work, such as healthcare workers who work with people who have TB 
Find out more about the BCG vaccine for tuberculosis (TB) 
Page last reviewed: 20 April 2023
Next review due: 20 April 2026
